# Muhammad Hafizh Taufiqurrohman (Taufiqu)

Muhammad Hafizh Taufiqurrohman (Taufiqu) is a Computer Science student at Universitas Lampung and a Software Engineer. He focuses on building scalable backend engines, server optimizations, and high-performance client-side web architectures.

## Core Roles & Background
- **Systems Architect & Full-Stack Engineer**: Specialized in full-stack JavaScript, PHP/Laravel, and secure real-time systems.
- **Location**: Lampung, Indonesia (UTC+7 / GMT+7).
- **Primary Contact**: taufiqu.dev@gmail.com

---

## Technical Stack

- **Languages & Frameworks**:
  - JavaScript / TypeScript
  - React.js / Next.js
  - Tailwind CSS
  - PHP / Laravel
- **Databases & Cloud**:
  - PostgreSQL / Supabase
  - Vercel Edge Networks
  - Linux Server Management (Ubuntu, Nginx, Docker)

---

## Key Projects

### 1. Dashboard Business Attrition
- **Description**: Enterprise analytics dashboard analyzing employee attrition metrics.
- **Features**: Interactive charts, filter parameters, and trend predictors.
- **Link**: [Live Demo](https://taufiqu.dev#projects)

### 2. GitLab Webhook CI/CD
- **Description**: Automated continuous integration and deployment engine linked to git repositories.
- **Features**: Docker compile logs, build notifications, and server state updates.
- **Link**: [Live Demo](https://taufiqu.dev#projects)

### 3. SIAKAD (Sistem Informasi Akademik)
- **Description**: Academic administration and database engine for universities.
- **Features**: Secure roles, grade calculation, and class scheduler.

### 4. Apotek Sahabat
- **Description**: POS (Point-of-Sale) management system for pharmacies.
- **Features**: Real-time sales logging, inventory warnings, and automatic reporting.
